let Declaration = require('../declaration') let utils = require('../utils') class Appearance extends Declaration { constructor(name, prefixes, all) { super(name, prefixes, all) if (this.prefixes) { this.prefixes = utils.uniq( this.prefixes.map(i => { if (i === '-ms-') { return '-webkit-' } return i }) ) } } } Appearance.names = ['appearance'] module.exports = Appearance
